case_title: WARNER, GEORGIANA S. et al VS CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO (NOGUEZ) et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IN JUGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HERRERA, DENNIS (NOGUEZ) HEARING SET FOR AUG-24-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IN JUGMENT OF AUG-24-2004, GRANTED
